personal.name: Ayush Bajaj
personal.title: Software Developer
personal.tagline: Building comprehensive systems and interactive applications.
personal.bio: I'm a Software Developer with experience in building full-stack platforms, machine learning models, and complex data pipelines. I focus on clean architecture, honest implementation, and solving real-world problems.
personal.about: My expertise spans web development, machine learning, and cloud infrastructure. I thrive on building tools and experiences that are functional, robust, and driven by real-world needs, from agricultural platforms to AI-powered video pipelines.

projects.title: AgriConnect
projects.subtitle: Full-stack Agricultural Platform
projects.description: Full-stack platform designed to centralize agricultural data and schemes. Built to improve usability and access to critical information for farmers using a robust React-based frontend and MongoDB backend.

projects.title: AI-Based PPT Explainer & Video Generator
projects.subtitle: Cloud-Deployed ML Pipeline
projects.description: An automated pipeline deployed on AWS EC2 that converts PowerPoint slides into narrated videos. Extracts text using python-pptx, generates contextual explanations using FLAN-T5, synthesizes speech via Amazon Polly, syncs lip movements using Wav2Lip, and renders the final video with FFmpeg.

projects.title: AI Disease Prediction Model
projects.subtitle: Classification-Based ML System
projects.description: A classification-based machine learning model for predicting diseases. Involved comprehensive feature engineering and comparative evaluation of algorithms, including KNN, Decision Tree, Naive Bayes, and Extra Trees, to identify the most effective predictive approach.
projects.codePreview:
from sklearn.ensemble import RandomForestClassifier

model = RandomForestClassifier(
  n_estimators=100,
  max_depth=10
)
model.fit(X_train, y_train)
accuracy = model.score(X_test, y_test)

projects.title: 3D Architecture Visualization System
projects.subtitle: Interactive 3D Walkthrough
projects.description: An interactive 3D walkthrough system for architectural visualization. Built using Blender for modeling and Unity for the interactive experience, integrating Python and OpenGL concepts to enhance rendering and interactivity.
